Variables.Name: FontName
Variables.Description: Name of the typeface for the font to import

Variables.Name: Height
Variables.Description: Height of font (point size)

Variables.Name: bEnableAntialiasing
Variables.Description: Whether the font should be antialiased or not.  Usually you should leave this enabled.

Variables.Name: bEnableBold
Variables.Description: Whether the font should be generated in bold or not

Variables.Name: bEnableItalic
Variables.Description: Whether the font should be generated in italics or not

Variables.Name: bEnableUnderline
Variables.Description: Whether the font should be generated with an underline or not

Variables.Name: bAlphaOnly
Variables.Description: if true then forces PF_G8 and only maintains Alpha value and discards color

Variables.Name: CharacterSet
Variables.Description: Character set for this font

Variables.Name: Chars
Variables.Description: Explicit list of characters to include in the font

Variables.Name: UnicodeRange
Variables.Description: Range of Unicode character values to include in the font.  You can specify ranges using hyphens andor commas (e.g. '400-900')

Variables.Name: CharsFilePath
Variables.Description: Path on disk to a folder where files that contain a list of characters to include in the font

Variables.Name: CharsFileWildcard
Variables.Description: File mask wildcard that specifies which files within the CharsFilePath to scan for characters in include in the font

Variables.Name: bCreatePrintableOnly
Variables.Description: Skips generation of glyphs for any characters that are not considered 'printable'

Variables.Name: bIncludeASCIIRange
Variables.Description: When specifying a range of characters and this is enabled, forces ASCII characters (0 thru 255) to be included as well

Variables.Name: ForegroundColor
Variables.Description: Color of the foreground font pixels.  Usually you should leave this white and instead use the UI Styles editor to change the color of the font on the fly

Variables.Name: bEnableDropShadow
Variables.Description: Enables a very simple, 1-pixel, black colored drop shadow for the generated font

Variables.Name: TexturePageWidth
Variables.Description: Horizontal size of each texture page for this font in pixels

Variables.Name: TexturePageMaxHeight
Variables.Description: The maximum vertical size of a texture page for this font in pixels.  The actual height of a texture page may be less than this if the font can fit within a smaller sized texture page.

Variables.Name: XPadding
Variables.Description: Horizontal padding between each font character on the texture page in pixels

Variables.Name: YPadding
Variables.Description: Vertical padding between each font character on the texture page in pixels

Variables.Name: ExtendBoxTop
Variables.Description: How much to extend the top of the UV coordinate rectangle for each character in pixels

Variables.Name: ExtendBoxBottom
Variables.Description: How much to extend the bottom of the UV coordinate rectangle for each character in pixels

Variables.Name: ExtendBoxRight
Variables.Description: How much to extend the right of the UV coordinate rectangle for each character in pixels

Variables.Name: ExtendBoxLeft
Variables.Description: How much to extend the left of the UV coordinate rectangle for each character in pixels

Variables.Name: bEnableLegacyMode
Variables.Description: Enables legacy font import mode.  This results in lower quality antialiasing and larger glyph bounds, but may be useful when debugging problems

Variables.Name: Kerning
Variables.Description: The initial horizontal spacing adjustment between rendered characters.  This setting will be copied directly into the generated Font object's properties.

Variables.Name: bUseDistanceFieldAlpha
Variables.Description: If true then the alpha channel of the font textures will store a distance field instead of a color mask

Variables.Name: DistanceFieldScaleFactor
Variables.Description:
Scale factor determines how big to scale the font bitmap during import when generating distance field values 
	 Note that higher values give better quality but importing will take much longer.

Variables.Name: DistanceFieldScanRadiusScale
Variables.Description: Shrinks or expands the scan radius used to determine the silhouette of the font edges.
